hero.headline: Five Decades of Pools, One Family's Promise
hero.subheadline: Easton Select Group brings together 15+ specialized pool brands under one roof, so you get local expertise backed by national resources. From construction to maintenance, water delivery to retail supplies — pool ownership has never been this simple.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs,<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From breaking ground on a brand-new pool to keeping it sparkling for decades, Easton Select Group's family of brands has every stage of pool ownership covered.

cards.title: Pool Construction & Renovation
cards.description: Custom inground pools, gunite builds, and complete renovations. Our expert teams design and construct pools that transform your backyard into a personal resort.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance & Service
cards.description: Seasonal maintenance programs including weekly cleaning, equipment checks, spring openings, and winterization. Reliable care that keeps your pool swim-ready year-round.

cards.title: Plunge Pool Manufacturing
cards.description: Customizable precast concrete plunge pools through Plunge Pool Concepts. The perfect luxury solution for smaller backyards and modern outdoor living spaces.

cards.title: Pool Water Delivery
cards.description: Premium water delivery through Atlantic Water Service for pool fills, top-offs, and seasonal needs. Convenient, reliable supply across Southeastern Massachusetts.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Services
cards.description: Professional care for hotels, fitness centers, community pools, and commercial aquatic facilities. Dedicated account management through New England Aquatics.

cards.title: Pool Supply Retail & Chemistry
cards.description: Full-service retail through South Shore Pool Supply. Chemicals, equipment, accessories, plus expert water testing and chemical balancing for crystal-clear results.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Effortless Pool Ownership

steps.title: Tell Us What You Need
steps.description: Whether you're building new, need maintenance, or want a renovation — share your vision. We'll connect you with the right brand from our family and provide an honest, detailed quote.

steps.title: We Match You With Experts
steps.description: Our TEC-Driven model pairs you with specialized local professionals from our 15+ brands. Every technician brings decades of family-business expertise and national-level resources.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Perfect Pool
steps.description: From first splash to ongoing care, we handle the details so you can enjoy the water. Over 50 years of experience means your pool is built right, maintained right, and enjoyed fully.

about.label: Why New England Trusts Us
about.headline: 50 Years of Family Values, 15+ Brands of Expertise
about.description: What began as a second-generation family business in Southeastern Massachusetts has grown into New England's premier platform of pool service brands. Founded by Henry Hobaica, Easton Select Group was built on a simple belief: we are good at what we do, we care deeply about the quality of our product, and we are proud of the service we deliver. That principle drives every brand in our portfolio, from Cape Cod to Maine.

features.title: Local Brands, National Resources
features.description: Each of our 15+ brands maintains its local identity and expertise while gaining access to corporate-level training, equipment, and support systems.

features.title: TEC-Driven Service Model
features.description: Trust, Execution, and Convenience aren't just words — they're the operating standard that every Easton Select brand is measured against, every single day.

features.title: Full-Spectrum Pool Solutions
features.description: Construction, maintenance, water delivery, retail supplies, commercial services, and plunge pools — no other company in New England covers more of pool ownership.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Family-Business Values.
pricing.subtitle: Every quote is honest, detailed, and pressure-free. We earn your trust through quality work, not contracts.

guarantee.headline: Our "Family Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: With five decades of reputation on the line, we stand behind every project and every service visit. If the work doesn't meet our standards — or yours — we come back and make it right at no additional cost. That's the Easton Select promise, backed by a name our family has spent 50 years building.

faqs.question: What areas does Easton Select Group serve?
faqs.answer: Our family of brands serves Southeastern Massachusetts, Cape Cod, Martha's Vineyard, Greater Boston, the North and South Shores, Maine (Portland area), Connecticut, Rhode Island, and throughout New England. Different brands specialize in different regions.

faqs.question: How is Easton Select Group different from a regular pool company?
faqs.answer: We're a platform of 15+ specialized pool brands, not a single company trying to do everything. Each brand is a local expert in its niche — construction, maintenance, water delivery, retail — backed by 50 years of family-business values and national-level resources.

faqs.question: Can you handle both residential and commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our residential brands handle everything from new construction to weekly maintenance, while New England Aquatics specializes in commercial facilities including hotels, fitness centers, and community pools across the region.

faqs.question: What is the TEC-Driven service model?
faqs.answer: TEC stands for Trust, Execution, and Convenience. It's the operating standard across all our brands. Trust means transparent, honest service. Execution means showing up on time and delivering quality. Convenience means making pool ownership stress-free.

faqs.question: How do I get started with a new pool project or service?
faqs.answer: Simply call us at 508-238-9698 or fill out the contact form. We'll learn about your needs, connect you with the right specialized brand, and provide a detailed, no-pressure quote — typically within 24-48 hours.

testimonials.name: Carmelita B.
testimonials.text: Partnering with Easton Select has given us the opportunity to grow in the commercial sector with more employee backing and resources available. The support system is unlike anything else in the industry.

testimonials.name: Kevin D.
testimonials.text: Joining the Easton Select family allows us to maintain our high standards while expanding our reach and service offerings. The customer support has been exceptional from day one.

testimonials.name: Verified Customer
testimonials.text: From our initial consultation down to start up, Easton staff was knowledgeable, pleasant and honest. By far the most professional and responsive pool company we have ever dealt with.
